title: Model indicator component with dropdown selection
purpose: Displays a compact model selection button that expands into a dropdown list of available models, allowing users to switch between different models.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named ModelIndicator that accepts model, onChange, and models props. Defines a default set of models and handles click events to toggle dropdown visibility and select models.

steps.content: Initialize state for tracking dropdown open/closed status.
Create a ref to track the container element for click handling.
Determine the list of available models to display, using provided models or falling back to default models.
Set up a document click handler to close the dropdown when clicking outside.
Define a handler function to process model selection and update state.
Render the button showing the current model and the dropdown list when open.
Check if the container reference is valid.
IF the clicked target is outside the container, close the dropdown.
Close the dropdown after a model is selected.
IF the selected model differs from the current model, invoke the change handler.
